_meta.voice: Direct American English. Premium dermatocosmetic brand voice: clinical, evidence-aware, no superlatives. Preserve brand name with apostrophe (Le'Muse Nature).

strings.3 аудиторії: чоловіки, жінки, діти · 7 к: 3 audiences: men, women, children · 7 catalog categories · 8+ trust, ingredient, and brand blocks · 0 extra steps to purchase or consultation
strings.Le'Muse Nature — e-commerce сайт для укр: Le'Muse Nature — e-commerce site for a Ukrainian dermatocosmetic brand
strings.Le'Muse Nature — преміальний український: Le'Muse Nature is a premium Ukrainian dermatocosmetic brand: serums, supplements, vitamins, lash and brow activators, shampoos, conditioners, and peels built on phytopeptide formulas and clinical research. We built an e-commerce platform that helps the brand do more than sell — it explains the value of each product, earns trust through ingredients and a science-led approach, and guides the user toward either a purchase or a free consultation with a specialist.
strings.Інтегрували консультацію зі спеціалістом: Wired up the specialist consultation through Telegram as a free path to a personalized product choice
strings.Бренду потрібен був сайт, який поєднує e: The brand needed a site that combines e-commerce, expertise, and premium visual presentation
strings.Головна задача — не просто вітрина товар: The core task — not just a product display, but a sales tool that builds trust and positions the brand as an expert
strings.Для дерматокосметики критично важливі до: For dermatocosmetics, trust is critical — along with explaining the ingredients, the mechanism of action, and the ability to get a consultation
strings.Додали Instagram-блок для підтримки живо: Added an Instagram block to support live communication with the audience
strings.Додали блок про особливості бренду: сине: Added a brand-specifics block: science-and-nature synergy, clinical efficacy, safe formula, Ukrainian manufacturing
strings.Додали розділ «Про бренд» із місією, скл: Added an "About the brand" section with the mission, formulation philosophy, and why physicians choose Le'Muse Nature
strings.Зручна навігація, зрозумілі розділи та п: Easy navigation, clear sections, a pleasant design. The site is genuinely comfortable to use.
strings.Каталог мав бути структурований за катег: The catalog had to be structured by product category and by selection scenario: for men, for women, and for children
strings.Користувач має швидко зрозуміти, який пр: The user should quickly figure out which product fits — by category, audience, or effect
strings.Окремо винесли сценарії вибору для трьох: Surfaced selection scenarios for three audiences separately: men, women, children
strings.Оформили блок бестселерів із назвою, цін: Built the bestsellers block with name, price, volume, and a short description of what each product does
strings.Передбачили сторінки доставки й оплати,: Set up dedicated pages for shipping and payment, returns, and the public offer agreement
strings.Побудували головну сторінку як структуру: Built the homepage as a trust-plus-sales structure: categories, bestsellers, brand, ingredients, consultation
strings.Продумали товарні картки з ціною, знижко: Designed product cards with price, discount, volume, and key properties
strings.Сайт мав підтримувати кілька сценаріїв к: The site had to support several user paths: buy, study the ingredients, learn about the brand, or get a consultation
strings.Створили каталог із 7 категоріями: добав: Built the catalog across 7 categories: supplements, lash and brow activators, serums, vitamins, shampoos, conditioners, peels
strings.Створили окремий блок інгредієнтів із фо: Built a dedicated ingredients block with photo, name, and an explanation of how each component works — reinforcing expertise
strings.зайвих кроків до покупки або консультаці: extra steps to purchase or consultation

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].image.alt.en: Le'Muse Nature before the new site launched

sections[_key==\"sec9\"].image.alt.uk: Нова головна сторінка сайту Le'Muse Nature з категоріями, бестселерами і блоком інгредієнтів
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].image.alt.en: Le'Muse Nature's new homepage with categories, bestsellers, and the ingredients block

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: Le'Muse Nature sells a considered product: users don't buy a serum or a supplement on impulse. They need to understand the formulation, the mechanism of action, who the product is for, and why this brand specifically. Without the right site structure, that value is lost and the sale doesn't happen.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built an e-commerce site for a premium dermatocosmetic brand, focused on trust, a guided selection flow, and a clear path to purchase or consultation. Every block does one job — explains the product's value, removes a doubt, or drives an action.
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: Le'Muse Nature got a full e-commerce platform where every site element works to sell through trust. A user can land, grasp what the brand stands for, find the right category, study the ingredients, browse bestsellers, then move on to a purchase or a free specialist consultation — all in one place, no extra steps. The structure supports not just today's sales but the brand's long-term positioning as expert and premium.
